title: 🎉 Welcome to PRO Studio!
message: We've completely revamped the QR generation experience to give you absolute creative freedom.
points: 🚀 UPI Payment QR: Create instant 'Scan to Pay' codes for your business.
✨ Custom Branding Banners: Add verified badges, titles, and descriptions directly inside your QR code.
🎨 12 New Premium Frames: From Polaroid and Neon to Ticket and Bubble styles.
🛡️ Flash Deals: Keep an eye out for hidden scratch cards to unlock lifetime premium discounts!

title: ⚡ Critical Performance Boost
message: We squashed some bugs and improved the scanning engine.
points: 🔍 Faster Decoding: Uploaded images are now scanned 2x faster.
🐛 Bug Fixes: Resolved an issue where Wi-Fi passwords were not encoding properly.
